name: Bondage Quest
description:
In a world without borders, you find yourself involved in a series of events that may change the history of this world.

You can become a hero or villain... you will be the one that save the damsel in distress... or maybe the one to become the one in peril... Or maybe you will be the one who will bring a new era of slavery to the races. from this world.

Is up to you and your decisions... build your own legend!  In the Bondage Quest!
creator: Kaylessa
